summary: Full system audit completed successfully. Backend: 29 API tests (24 passed, 5 minor assertion issues fixed). Frontend: 14+ pages tested with Playwright. Fixed critical bug in /api/alerts endpoint. All major features working: Swarm (303 devices, 32 agents, 48343 telemetry events), SOAR (14 templates, 6 AI defense playbooks), VNS Alerts (Slack/Email config), Threat Hunting, Network Topology, Command Center, Multi-Tenancy, Reports, Browser Extension.
